title: The Trap for Fisher Tiger
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Fisher Tiger, Arlong, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4. The core beat is the trap for fisher tiger.
scene: The scene follows the trap for fisher tiger, keeping the focus on Fisher Tiger, Arlong, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4.

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: following the death of Fisher Tiger, Hero of slaves...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: ...Arlong's hatred for humans grew still stronger, and he turned upon them viciously...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...only to be captured ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it weren't for that damn refusal... He could have lived !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: If we had only had some fish-man blood... Fisher Tiger wouldn't have died!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: You filthy Humans ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Prove him to his death !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: the grand line; the sun pirates' ship

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Due to the humans refusing to offer a blood transfusion in

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...Fisher Tiger, Captain of the Sun Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...met his end."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It is not too far from the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, the ultimate blame for his death...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...Does lie with the humans...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong must have lied to the Marines...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was the humans that betrayed him... and his grudge against the humans that led him to refuse the transfusion.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And of course, there is his past as a slave... the truth is crueller still.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would cast a stain upon his honour...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong would not reveal such things.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Quite ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's an enemy vessel !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Even with our leader gone...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...we can no longer turn back from this path....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Prepare for Battle !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And remember - we will not take a life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yeah!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: The Sun Pirates ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...under their new captain, "Jimbel, Knight of the Sea"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am continued to live out their days of inevitable conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Marine HQ

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The real danger ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Is that jimbe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His strength is nothing less than astounding ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Fish-Man Island - Ryluguu Palace

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I write to you of these matters ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....because I feel that you, at least, have the right to know the entire truth.

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Jinbe, Captain of the Sun Pirates."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I have made my decision !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: .....!! So tiger had no choice but to choose the path he did...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hollow scream that I heard in his heart that day ... it makes sense now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But fear not....!! I will not give in!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must live under the rays of the sun!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The day will surely come when we can achieve true understanding with the humans!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The company has been designed

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your signature, please!!! I need your support for the relocation !!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: I can't do it!! Your majesty ... it's just not possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Tiger-san was a righteous hero who rescued all slaves, without regard for race...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...yet the humans left him to die!! How can we forgive them for that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Another day with not a single signature ...

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Mother, are you okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Princess Shirahoahi 1Age (4)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You okay? You okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: She seems quite exhausted ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ah, Shira- Hoshi... My haven and comfort...

summary: The Trap for Fisher Tiger. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
